# ConformanceRequirements.IsCitationLoadBearing method

Returns `false` always: no §30 citation marker is ever load-bearing (spec R-30-a). The answer is unconditionally "not load-bearing", independent of which marker is named.

```csharp
public static bool IsCitationLoadBearing(string citationMarker)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| citationMarker | The citation marker (ignored). |

## Return Value

Always `false`.
